meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS pricing to Solve can't collaborate (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome can't collaborate. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS pricing to Solve can't collaborate
content.seo_description: Learn how to optimize SaaS pricing and overcome collaboration bottlenecks. A Beginner-level Checklist for freelancers using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Collaboration friction kills SaaS projects. By implementing tiered pricing models that gate features, you create clear value boundaries. Use Antigravity to scaffold your billing logic and Claude Code to automate the integration of Stripe webhooks, ensuring your pricing strategy scales without manual intervention or messy team coordination overhead.
content.intro:
The screen flickers, a client is waiting, and your codebase is a siloed mess of hardcoded logic. You are stuck in the 'lone wolf' trap where collaboration is an afterthought, causing your pricing model to stagnate while your development velocity grinds to a halt.

But the tide is turning. By shifting to a modular, pricing-aware architecture, you transform your SaaS from a static script into a dynamic revenue engine. This isn't just about money; it's about building a system so clean that collaboration becomes the default, not the exception.

steps.title: Architecting the Pricing Schema
steps.description: Define your SaaS tiers as a JSON-based schema to ensure your frontend and backend stay synced, preventing collaboration drift.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a robust TypeScript interface for a tiered SaaS pricing model (Free, Pro, Enterprise) including feature-gating flags and monthly/annual cycle support.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --instruction 'generate types/pricing.ts based on the schema and export it for global use'

steps.title: Automating Stripe Webhook Handlers
steps.description: Use Claude Code to build a resilient listener that updates user access levels instantly when a payment event triggers.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a secure Express.js webhook handler for Stripe that maps checkout.session.completed events to database user role updates.

steps.title: Implementing Feature Gating Middleware
steps.description: Create reusable middleware to restrict API access based on the user's current subscription tier.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Node.js middleware function that checks a user's subscription tier against requested API routes and returns 403 for unauthorized features.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --instruction 'apply this middleware to all routes in /api/v1/projects'

steps.title: Visualizing Pricing Tiers in UI
steps.description: Build a responsive pricing table that dynamically pulls data from your new schema to avoid hardcoding changes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Tailwind CSS pricing card component that consumes the pricing schema and highlights the recommended tier.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --instruction 'integrate the pricing component into the /pricing route'

steps.title: Deploying the Revenue Pipeline
steps.description: Finalize your environment variables and deploy the logic to ensure the pricing engine is live and testable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a deployment checklist for a SaaS pricing engine, focusing on environment variable validation and webhook security.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal --command 'npm run build && npm run start'

pro_tips: Always use UUIDs for pricing plans in your DB to allow for easy plan renaming without breaking existing user subscriptions.
Implement 'soft gating' in your UI—show locked features with a 'Upgrade to Pro' CTA to increase conversion rates by 20%.
Store pricing logic in a central constant file; never hardcode price IDs in your React components.
Use a local Stripe CLI instance to simulate webhook events before pushing to production to avoid 'zombie' subscription states.
Include a 'grace period' field in your user model to prevent immediate service disruption during payment retries.
content.next_steps: Once your pricing engine is live, integrate a feedback loop like Crisp or Intercom to track why users are hitting your gated features, then refine your tiers accordingly.
content.conversion_block: Stop building in the dark and start shipping revenue-ready SaaS products that scale effortlessly. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
